lines.speaker: Olivier
lines.text: I brought something. Old work. Pre-digital. You won't see this in any catalog.

lines.speaker: Olivier
lines.text: This one — 1997. Milan. The model never worked again after this shoot. Her choice.

lines.speaker: Olivier
lines.text: I think she became an architect. Better job, honestly.
He handles each photo like a sentence he's still deciding whether to say.

lines.speaker: Olivier
lines.text: I brought them because I wanted to show you who I was before I knew what I was doing.
You sit with the photographs long after he's gone. Some of them look like things you want to become.
